---
title: "Week 20 — Time Series Forecasting"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 20 Overview

Build ARIMA forecasting models, evaluate forecast accuracy, and review the full course with a mini applied project.

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Lecture 1 | ARIMA Models | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Forecast Evaluation | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Course Review | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |
